javascript:(()%3D%3E%7Bconst%20u%3D%22PASTE_RAW_GIST_URL_HERE%22%3Bif(!u%7C%7Cu%3D%3D%3D'PASTE_RAW_GIST_URL_HERE')%7Balert('MapShare%20Companion%3A%20set%20the%20raw%20gist%20URL%20in%20this%20bookmarklet%20first.')%3Breturn%3B%7Dfetch(u%2B(u.includes('%3F')%3F'%26'%3A'%3F')%2B'_grt%3D'%2BDate.now()%2C%7Bcache%3A'no-store'%7D).then(r%3D%3E%7Bif(!r.ok)throw%20Error('HTTP%20'%2Br.status)%3Breturn%20r.text()%7D).then(code%3D%3E(0%2Ceval)(code)).catch(e%3D%3Ealert('MapShare%20Companion%20loader%20failed%3A%20'%2B(e%26%26e.message%7C%7Ce)))%3B%7D)()%3B
